title: Author a socket bucket refactor from procedural LV
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/trip_planner_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TripPlannerLive). The LiveView has 4 distinct UI sections (search, results, selected, summary). Decompose into 4 stateless function components: <.search_panel>, <.results_panel>, <.selected_panel>, <.summary_panel>. All four must be declared as function components in the same file via `use Phoenix.Component` on a helper module MyAppWeb.TripPlannerComponents. Each takes only the assigns it needs — no passing of the entire socket. The LiveView render/1 is a simple composition.
tier_rationale: Requires 4 distinct component declarations + composition. Multi-site discipline.
